title: LaTeX用家，六年經驗，你問我答

replies.msg:
https://www.latex-project.org

LaTeX is a high-quality typesetting system; it includes features designed for the production of technical and scientific documentation. LaTeX is the de facto standard for the communication and publication of scientific documents. LaTeX is available as free software.

用完之後唔會再想用返Word
Word對我嚟講，只淨低佢個replace功能

有無用開LaTeX嘅巴打交流下
用開邊個source或editor
或者有咩常用或好用嘅package
真係屎忽痕先再諗下開個page或post去推廣呢樣嘢

講定先
Source: MikTeX
Editor: TeXstudio
常用package: tikz, geometry, siunitx, tkz-euclide, pgflots, tabu
未用過嚟寫thesis，所以Thesis相關嘅嘢可能要等其他人答

1. 最基本嘅嘢呢條link有：http://www.cs.princeton.edu/courses/archive/spr10/cos433/Latex/latex-guide.pdf
其他都係用用下，發現問題，再上網google，網上好多人討論呢個，不過英文討論為主。有時搵搵下發現某啲好用嘅package，然後再大改自己堆code

2. 應該上面條link答到你

3. 我本身唔識coding（到而家連基本Programming都唔曉），用用下慣咗就會上手。當然如果你有code底會學快好多，呢隻嘢啲code聞說係似pascal

looks good...


用呢隻自動排版無得彈
寫好database，幾百頁document一撳就自動排版，唔洗煩
你只需要擔心內容，唔洗擔心排版

有無新手guide？
呢度好多free e-books睇:
http://freecomputerbooks.com/specialTeXAndLaTeXBooks.html
其中The Not So Short Introduction to LaTeX係俾新手睇, 唔錯既!

大致上點運作？
- Install LaTeX System [Windows: MikTeX, Linux: TeX Live, MacOS: MacTeX]
- Prepare your document in plain text format (file extension .tex is preferred but not mandatory)
- Open the document in editors like TeXworks and Emacs w/ AucTeX
- Insert control sequences inside the document
- Typeset it (by pdfLaTeX)
- And Voila! A beautiful pdf file will be generated for your perusal

洗唔洗識coding？
唔算係乜野coding嚟, 只需係適當地方加上適當既control sequences就OK!

LyX我好少用
我而家做法係先用開個standalone用tikz, pgf, tkz-euclide畫圖，再用includestabdalone入落個file度

主要係因為畫圖比較用時間，獨立處理再input會慳極多compiling time

\usepackage{CJK}

除咗樓主google果個solution, 我睇番一本TeX天書(A Plain TeX Primer), 佢話一句搞掂:

\pretolerance=100000

呢句野當然要打喺begin document前面啦!

Hope this also helps!

有幾多人識讀又讀得啱LaTeX同埋LyX


我對LaTeX (A macro for TeX)同LyX(A word processor embedded with LaTeX)都唔多有性趣研究, 只對佢地老母(i.e. TeX or plain TeX)起到機!

(已有兩本TeX天書(A Plain TeX Primer by Malcolm Clark & TeX Reference Manual by David Bausum), 足夠我學一世了! )

有幾多人識讀又讀得啱LaTeX同埋LyX


BTW, LaTeX有兩個讀法([Lah-tech] or [Lay-tech]), 我平常讀Lay-tech(尾音同德語loch咁上下囉). LyX就唔知點讀喇!
